results.title: Sanofi launches AI-powered agent for sales representatives
results.description: Built on Snowflake Cortex AI, the agent enables representatives to generate comprehensive pre-call plans through a single conversational interface

results.title: Horoscope Today: Daily astrological predictions for June 6, 2026

results.title: Walmart has a $650 electric bike for just $350 that goes 65 miles on one charge
results.description: "This bike is a monster; I rode it for three days, and it still has 50% battery life."
